mapper.insert: INSERT INTO withdrawal_requests (wallet_id, source_type, amount, fee_amount, net_transfer_amount, bank_name, account_number, account_holder_name, status, reject_reason, requested_at, processed_at) VALUES (#{walletId}, #{sourceType}, #{amount}, #{feeAmount}, #{netTransferAmount}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountHolderName}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{requestedAt}, #{processedAt})
